# Test script: ./runtests

```
     1	#!/bin/zsh
     2	
     3	rm -rf /tmp/outputs
     4	rm -rf ./ps-data
     5	rm -rf ./obs-spitzer
     6	rm -rf ./obs-temp
     7	rm -rf ./logs
     8	rm *.csv
     9	
    10	mkdir ./ps-data
    11	mkdir ./obs-spitzer
    12	mkdir ./obs-temp
    13	mkdir ./logs
    14	
    15	echo "# Test script: $0"
    16	echo
    17	
    18	echo "\`\`\`"
    19	cat -n "$0"
    20	echo "\`\`\`"
    21	
    22	echo
    23	
    24	python3 run-all-f32-compression-tests.py -f ./datasets/ps_data.f32   -tfrom 0.01 -tto 0.03 -tstep 0.001
    25	mv results.csv ps_data.csv
    26	
    27	python3 run-all-f32-compression-tests.py -f ./datasets/obs_spitzer_50000.f32 -tfrom 1.0 -tto 10.0 -tstep 0.1
    28	
    29	mv results.csv obs_spitzer.csv
    30	
    31	python3 run-all-f32-compression-tests.py -f ./datasets/obs_temp_50000.f32    -tfrom 1.0 -tto 10.0 -tstep 0.1
    32	
    33	mv results.csv obs_temp.csv
```




---------------------------------
